basic_details.job_title: DRDO DRL Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The Defence Research Laboratory (DRDO DRL) has released the official Junior Research Fellow Notification 2026 on 21 April 2026 at drdo.gov.in. A total of 5 vacancies have been announced under the DRDO DRL JRF Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged up to 28 years with a qualification of M.Pharm / M.S (Pharm) / M.Tech (Pharmaceutics / Pharmacology / Pharmaceutical Chemistry and related fields) can apply via email submission before 12 May 2026. The official notification PDF and application details are available below.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 28 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST - 05 years, OBC - 03 years

qualification.education_qualification: M.Pharm, M.S.(Pharm), M.Tech(Pharm), M.Tech(Pharmaceutics), M.Tech(Pharmacology & Toxicology), M.Tech(Pharmacology), M.Tech(Pharmaceutical Chemistry)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DRDO DRL Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 12-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DRDO DRL Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 12th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's degree in Pharmacy (M.Pharm, M.S.(Pharm), M.Tech(Pharm)) or M.Tech in Pharmaceutics, Pharmacology & Toxicology, Pharmacology, or Pharmaceutical Chemistry.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies announced for the Junior Research Fellow post at Defence Research Laboratory (DRDO DRL).

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Junior Research Fellow position is 28 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST and OBC categories.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a monthly stipend of Rs. 37,000/- for the Junior Research Fellow position.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for DRDO DRL Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection of candidates will be based on a Walk-in Interview. Candidates are advised to be prepared for the interview process.

faq.question: Q7. Where is the Defence Research Laboratory located?
faq.answer: The Defence Research Laboratory (DRDO DRL) is located in Tezpur, Assam, with the pincode 784001.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: As per the information available, there is no application fee mentioned for this recruitment drive. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is DRL/JRF/Interview/02/2026.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should I carry for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all relevant educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and passport-size photographs, along with a duly filled application form, for the Walk-in Interview.
